description_long: This is a two-story suburban house with a modern yet traditional design, featuring a prominent gable roof over the garage and a flat roof section over the main living area. The front yard is landscaped with a circular patch of grass and a flowering tree, while the driveway leads to a double garage. The rear of the house boasts a spacious backyard with a wooden deck, a swimming pool, and a fenced perimeter for privacy. Large windows are distributed asymmetrically across the facade, providing ample natural light to the interior. The main entryway is accentuated by a small porch with columns and a paved walkway. The exterior is finished in light-colored siding with contrasting dark roofing and trim.
description: A two-story modern-traditional house with a gable and flat roof, landscaped front yard, double garage, and a backyard featuring a deck and swimming pool.
description_view_0: Front view showing the driveway, double garage, landscaped yard with a circular lawn and flowering tree, and the main entryway with a small porch.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the plain exterior wall, window arrangement, and a glimpse of the backyard pool and deck area.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the wooden deck, large swimming pool, fenced backyard, and extensive windows on the lower level.
description_view_3: Angled view from the garage side, showing the transition from the driveway to the backyard, the pool, and the deck area.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large windows and some grouped in rows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a small covered porch, columns, paved walkway, and decorative landscaping
